# CensorZero: Independent Audit of IMI's Assessment of Ukrinform

> Open-source research with two visible layers:
> - main public comparison: 79,505 audited articles across 3 periods
> - source-audit subset: 51,589 audited articles across 2 post-appointment periods

## Three-Period Public Layer

- P0: 2023-05-01 -> 2023-10-31, before Matsuka, Ukrinform remained in the White List
- P1: 2023-11-09 -> 2024-04-25, Matsuka period, Ukrinform was excluded
- P2: 2025-07-01 -> 2025-12-15, later period before re-inclusion
- Audited totals: 27,916 + 26,342 + 25,247 = 79,505

Without ATO, parket rates are:
- P0: 5.80%
- P1: 4.97%
- P2: 4.14%

With ATO, parket rates are:
- P0: 5.87%
- P1: 5.12%
- P2: 4.67%

## Two-Period Source-Audit Subset

- 51,667 URLs collected from public sitemaps
- 51,589 articles successfully audited
- 78 articles unavailable during HTML fetch
- Without ATO: 39,230 audited articles

Canonical two-period results:
- Without ATO: parket 4.97% vs 4.14%; balance 5.77% vs 4.87%
- With ATO: parket 5.12% vs 4.67%; balance 6.01% vs 5.57%

## Canonical Method

- Official URL classification uses word boundaries and known prefixes, not raw substring matches.
- Official source classification uses Ukrainian/Cyrillic entity markers in extracted source names.
- `parket` and `balance` are distinct metrics:
  - `parket`: official URL + <=1 source + 0 non-official sources
  - `balance`: official URL + 0 non-official sources

## Primary Files

- Site: https://ukrinform.censorzero.com/
- English page: https://ukrinform.censorzero.com/en.html
- Explorer: https://ukrinform.censorzero.com/explorer.html
- Repo: https://github.com/alexmazuka/ukrinform
- Corrections log: https://github.com/alexmazuka/ukrinform/blob/main/CORRECTIONS.md
